description_long: This object consists of three Aveeno Baby lotion containers, each with a distinct packaging style. The first two are squeezable tubes with light beige bodies, blue caps, and subtle vertical pinstripes, featuring the Aveeno Baby branding and product details in blue and brown text. The third container is a pump bottle with a rounded body, a blue pump dispenser, and a matching blue base, also adorned with the same branding and pinstripe pattern. All containers display a delicate wheat graphic and minimalist design elements, giving a gentle and clean appearance. The pump bottle is slightly larger and more cylindrical, while the tubes are tapered and stand upright on their caps. The overall look is soft, hygienic, and suitable for baby care, with a cohesive color palette and branding.
description: Three Aveeno Baby lotion containers: two squeezable tubes and one pump bottle, all with beige bodies, blue accents, and minimalist pinstripe graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three containers with clear branding, product names, and graphics visible.
description_view_1: Side view of the pump bottle, highlighting the blue pump mechanism and the bottle's rounded profile.
description_view_2: Reverse front view with the pump bottle on the left and both tubes, showing their backs and the pump's front.
description_view_3: Rear side view of the pump bottle, focusing on the pump's vertical alignment and the bottle's curvature.
